evals.prompt: I have a client folder with tax documents for Sarah Martinez. She's a single filer with a W-2 job and some freelance design income. Please prepare her 2025 Form 1040 return — read through all the documents in the client folder, populate the Excel workbook, review it, and generate the PDF. The client docs are in evals/test-client-1/ and the blank workbook template is at mnt/Tax templates/1040_Tax_Return_2025.xlsx. Save the populated workbook and PDF to mnt/Tax templates/.
evals.expected_output: Populated Excel workbook with all of Sarah's income, deductions, and credits correctly entered. PDF return package showing accurate totals. Should include Schedule C for freelance income, Schedule SE for self-employment tax, capital gains on Schedules D and 8949, and proper standard vs itemized comparison.

evals.prompt: Here's a folder with all the tax docs for James and Linda Chen — married filing jointly, high income couple with kids, rental property, foreign accounts, and a K-1. Please go through everything, prepare their full 1040 return in the Excel workbook, review it for accuracy, and generate the PDF. Client docs are in evals/test-client-2/, blank template at mnt/Tax templates/1040_Tax_Return_2025.xlsx. Save outputs to mnt/Tax templates/.
evals.expected_output: Complete MFJ return with all income sources populated. Should include 3 dependents, both W-2s, interest/dividends, capital gains (including short-term loss), Schedule E rental property, K-1 income, itemized deductions with SALT cap, child care credit, foreign tax credit, FBAR/FATCA reporting for the HK account, and correct total tax/refund calculation.
